final:
module RefModule (
	input clk,
	input s_in,
	input [7:0] p_in,
	input load,
	output reg [7:0] q);
  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
	if (load) begin
		q <= p_in;
	end else begin
		q <= {q[6:0], s_in};
	end
end
endmodule
